exit_criteria: Feedback requirements map to updated KB clauses.
Executable delta is covered by planning handoff TASK-074.

evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

next_loop.reason: Planning loop starts from documentation build.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Compiler loops declare and follow fresh-session or context-reset boundaries.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation block without fresh-context/clean/SHA evidence.
Graph and skills expose fresh-start expectations for next loops.

evidence_mapping.evidence: compilers.md and builds.md define loop_start and next_loop isolation policy.
validation-gateway.md and api.md require block on missing fresh_context/clean/SHA evidence for protected profiles.
graph.md and codewiki skills instruct fresh loop handoffs and independent validators.

summary: Document enforceable loop/session isolation policy with build isolation requirements.
